Results

  • Repository Package Scan Report

Repository Package Scan Report

This is the amalgated view of manifest and lock packages being used over our repositories, their licenses (where available), versions and location information.

This allows us to see a centralised view of what tooling we are using over the estate.

Notes

In order for data to show here, the repository must include a workflow for our github action such as this.

This repository then includes a workflow to run the amalgamated action of the report and finally within the publishing workflow a stage to fetch that report and merge it to this page.
